sections_cited: section 53 of the Sindh Land Revenue Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1171 of 2011 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Before; Mr. Justice Muhammad Shafi Siddiqui Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah. 31.03.2022 Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Laghari, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. == The petitioner by way of instant petition has sought for direction against the respondents for mutation of revenue record of rights in respect of the subject land. The revenue entries being decades old and chequered in nature involving factual controversy could not be directed by this Court to be mutated by the respondents in summary manner at the instance of petitioner, who obviously has to establish his title/character in record of right first as is prescribed under section 53 of the Sindh Land Revenue Act, 1967; consequently the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Muhammad Danish*
